markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on website relaunch, content reviews, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Production Paused:** Production is on hold next week to allow for a full review of two "calibration" articles. This ensures the new competitive positioning is correct before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Comparison Article Strategy:** Articles will be HX-forward to match user search intent, but will be refined to give competitors more credit. This balances SEO goals with thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Website Relaunch Follow-up:** Blog auto-publishing will be tested after Franki finalizes new categories and featured images. Growth X will then update its Looker dashboard for aligned analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [**PSEO Proposal:** A proposal for a high-volume (10 pages/week) programmatic SEO project was shared. A decision is needed to scope the required design work and plan the next content batch.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Feedback Process

  - [**Franki's Holiday Coverage:** Franki is OOO (Dec 17–Jan 3). Diane will cover non-technical reviews; technical articles will be paused.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**AI Training Feedback:** To train the AI model, use suggested edits for specific changes and comments for high-level feedback (e.g., "too salesy"). Do not delete and re-draft, as this loses valuable training data.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### Comparison Article Strategy

  - [**Issue:** Mehmet noted the first draft of the "pricing vendor comparison" article was too HX-sided.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Decision:** The HX-forward style is acceptable, as it aligns with user search intent and provides a clear point of view. However, articles will be refined to give competitors more credit, improving the content's thought leadership quality.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Source Material:** Mehmet will send updated competitor positioning documents tomorrow. Growth X will use this to update its internal artifacts and re-run this week's articles, delaying delivery to early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

### Website Relaunch & Auto-Publishing

  - [**Blog Auto-Publishing:** A test is pending Franki's finalization of blog categories and featured images tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [**Featured Images:** A set of 10–12 abstract images will be used for all posts.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [**Engineering Support:** Alec Kirkland (Growth X) is on standby to assist with the Framer connection if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Analytics Alignment:** Growth X will update its Looker dashboard to align with the new blog categories, ensuring accurate performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [**High-Level Topics:** David had concerns about the AI pipeline's ability to write complex, market-level articles (e.g., "AI insurance platforms for PNC").](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Growth X sees these as high-value keywords with weak current SERP results, representing a major opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [**Path Forward:** Growth X will run one topic through the pipeline as a test. Deyan and Franki will then review it to determine if the output is a viable starting point.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [**PSEO (Programmatic SEO) Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Details:** A proposal for a high-volume (10 pages/week) project was shared. The first batch is a 6-week project on "lines of business."](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [**Action:** A decision is needed to scope the required design work for the page template and plan the next content batch. Jacob (Growth X) will join next week's call to discuss.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### Admin & Logistics

  - [**AI Citation Tracking:** Growth X's tool tracks AI citations for the entire Hyperexponential brand, not just content. Bailey will export and share historical reports.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [**Content OS Access:** Mehmet requested access to Content OS; Bailey will add all team members.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [**Hyperexponential:** Franki OOO (Dec 17–Jan 3); Mehmet available.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [**Growth X:** Closed (Dec 25–Jan 1); an async update will be sent before the break.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Franki:**](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

      - [Send new brand guidelines PDF to Growth X.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [Assign non-technical reviews to Diane before OOO.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Mehmet:**](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [Send updated competitor positioning documents to Growth X (by Dec 12).](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [Test blog auto-publishing after receiving updates from Franki.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [Update internal artifacts with new positioning and re-run this week's articles (delivery early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [Export and send historical AI citation reports.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
      - [Grant Content OS access to the Hyperexponential team.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
      - [Run a test article for a high-level topic and tag Deyan/Franki for review.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [Send a list of flagged high-level topics to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
      - [Cancel the Dec 26 meeting and send an async update.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Hyperexponential Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [Review the PSEO proposal to prepare for next week's discussion with Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/3H4imAz98S4gQ2xCw7TfyHc4xBHWZ9H8?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
